title: Dashboard loads and displays core KPI widgets
description: Verifies the main dashboard renders and shows key semester KPI information to the user.

title: Open a subject card and view subject details modal
description: Verifies a subject card on the dashboard can be opened to reveal a subject details modal with quick actions.

steps.description: Verify element "Subject details modal" is visible

title: Close subject details modal from dashboard
description: Verifies the subject details modal can be dismissed and the user returns to the dashboard view.

steps.description: Verify element "Subject details modal" is visible
Click on "Close" in the subject details modal
Verify element "Subject details modal" is not visible

title: Gmail widget absent and 'Connect Gmail' CTA is offered
description: Verifies that when Gmail is not connected, the dashboard shows a 'Connect Gmail' call-to-action instead of the Gmail widget.

steps.description: Verify element "Gmail widget" is not visible

title: Open 'Connect Gmail' contextual API key modal (progressive disclosure)
description: Verifies clicking the 'Connect Gmail' CTA opens a contextual modal requesting an API Key.

steps.description: Verify element "Connect Gmail modal" is visible

title: Dismiss the 'Connect Gmail' modal and remain on dashboard
description: Verifies the Gmail connection modal can be closed without navigating away from the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify element "Connect Gmail modal" is visible
Click on "Close" in the Connect Gmail modal
Verify element "Connect Gmail modal" is not visible

title: Dashboard quick links navigate to core modules
description: Verifies the dashboard provides working quick links to major modules and navigation lands on the correct pages.

steps.description: Click on "Dashboard" in the main navigation

title: Dashboard countdown widget is present and labeled
description: Verifies the dashboard includes a clearly labeled countdown section for upcoming academic milestones.

title: View curriculum map grid and progress indicators
description: Verifies the Malla page renders an 8-semester grid with visible credit/progress indicators.

title: Open a subject detail from the grid
description: Verifies a subject in the curriculum grid can be opened to view available actions including state changes.

steps.description: Click on a subject card in "Semestre 1"
Verify element "Mark as En Curso" is visible

title: Mark a subject as En Curso and see state reflected in the grid
description: Verifies marking a subject as En Curso updates the visible state on the curriculum grid.

steps.description: Click on a subject card in "Semestre 1"
Verify the selected subject shows state "En curso" in the grid

title: Create Aether folder after marking subject En Curso (happy path)
description: Verifies that marking a subject En Curso results in a corresponding folder being visible in Aether.

steps.description: Click on a subject card in "Semestre 1"
Verify the selected subject shows state "En curso" in the grid
Verify element "Folder" with the same subject name is visible

title: Cancel/close subject details without changing state
description: Verifies a user can dismiss the subject details view and the grid remains unchanged.

steps.description: Click on a subject card in "Semestre 1"
Verify element "Subject details" is not visible
Verify text "En curso" is not visible

title: Credit/progress indicators update after marking a subject En Curso
description: Verifies credit/progress indicators visibly change after a subject state change that affects progress.

steps.description: Click on a subject card in "Semestre 1"
Verify the selected subject shows state "En curso" in the grid
Verify element "credit progress" shows an updated value

title: Filter by semester, change status to 'en curso', and save a grade successfully
description: Verifies a user can filter subjects by semester, set a subject to 'en curso', edit its grade, and see the updated values reflected in the list.

steps.description: Select option "1" from the semester filter dropdown
Click on the subject status control for the first visible subject
Verify text "en curso" is visible on the first visible subject row
Click on "Edit grades" for the first visible subject
Verify text "15" is visible on the first visible subject row

title: Filter semester '1' shows a subject list state and is persistent on the page
description: Verifies filtering by semester updates the visible list and the filter selection remains applied while staying on the Materias page.

steps.description: Select option "1" from the semester filter dropdown
Scroll to the bottom of the subjects list
Scroll to the top of the subjects list

title: Edit grade input validation blocks saving when the grade is empty
description: Verifies the grade editor does not allow saving an empty grade and keeps the user in an editable state or shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click on "Edit grades" for the first visible subject

title: Cancel grade editing does not change the displayed grade
description: Verifies that exiting the grade editor without saving leaves the previously displayed grade unchanged.

steps.description: Verify element "Grade" is visible for the first visible subject
Click on "Edit grades" for the first visible subject
Verify element "Grade" is visible for the first visible subject

title: Switch status between 'en curso' and 'aprobada' updates the displayed label
description: Verifies status toggling between states updates the visible status label on the subject row.

steps.description: Click on the subject status control for the first visible subject
Select option "en curso" from the status dropdown
Verify text "en curso" is visible on the first visible subject row
Click on the subject status control for the first visible subject
Select option "aprobada" from the status dropdown
Verify text "aprobada" is visible on the first visible subject row

title: Create a new task with title and due date and see it on the Kanban board
description: Verifies a user can create a task and it becomes visible in a Kanban column.

steps.description: Type "Read chapter 3" into the title field
Type "2026-03-20" into the due date field

title: Fail to create a task when title is empty (validation error)
description: Verifies the task form enforces required title validation and prevents creation.

steps.description: Type "2026-03-20" into the due date field

title: Calendario: Weekly view can be selected and calendar content remains visible
description: Verifies that switching to weekly view works and the calendar still renders visible content.

title: Create a new note with a wiki-style link and verify it appears in the vault list
description: Verifies that a user can create a new note containing a [[Wiki]] link and that the note becomes visible in the Aether Vault list after saving/auto-save.

steps.description: Type "E2E Note - Wiki Link" into the note title field
Type "This is a test note linking to [[Linked Note]]." into the note content editor
Verify text "E2E Note - Wiki Link" is visible

title: Create a new note and verify the linked note appears as a visible graph connection
description: Verifies that after creating a note with a [[Wiki]] link, the graph view shows a visible relationship between notes.

steps.description: Type "Graph Source Note" into the note title field
Type "Connecting to [[Graph Target Note]] for graph test." into the note content editor
Verify text "Graph Source Note" is visible
Verify text "Graph Target Note" is visible

title: Attempt to save a note and handle 'Encryption key required' by opening Security Settings
description: Verifies the encryption gating flow: saving triggers an 'Encryption key required' modal and the user can proceed to Security Settings to set a passphrase prompt.

steps.description: Type "Encrypted Note Attempt" into the note title field
Type "This note should require encryption key before saving." into the note content editor
Verify text "Encryption key required" is visible

title: Cancel out of the encryption requirement modal and remain on the note editor
description: Verifies that dismissing the encryption requirement modal does not navigate away and the editor remains visible for the current note.

steps.description: Type "Encryption Modal Cancel" into the note title field
Type "Trigger encryption modal and then cancel." into the note content editor
Verify text "Encryption key required" is visible
Verify element "note content editor" is visible

title: Create a note with an empty title and verify a visible validation message (if enforced)
description: Verifies that the UI prevents saving a note without a title (or shows a clear validation message).

steps.description: Type "Body without a title" into the note content editor

title: Create a note with an empty body and verify it can be saved and listed (or shows validation)
description: Verifies behavior when saving a note that has a title but no content: it should either save successfully and appear in the list or show a visible validation message.

steps.description: Type "Title Only Note" into the note title field
Verify text "Title Only Note" is visible

title: Create a new canvas node and add text content
description: Verifies a user can add a node on Aether Canvas and save text content to it.

steps.description: Click on the newly created node
Type "Study: Diagram for system architecture" into the node text field
Verify text "Study: Diagram for system architecture" is visible

title: Canvas persistence: node remains after reload
description: Verifies a node created on the canvas is still available after reloading the page.

steps.description: Click on the newly created node
Type "Persistent node" into the node text field

title: Add multiple nodes and confirm both are visible
description: Verifies the canvas can contain multiple nodes and each one is visible after creation.

steps.description: Type "Node A" into the node text field

title: Cancel node creation (if supported) does not add a node
description: Verifies canceling out of node creation leaves the canvas unchanged (no new node visible).

steps.description: Verify text "Node details" is not visible

title: Start chat and receive an assistant response based on private notes
description: Verifies a user can start a new Aether Chat session and receive a visible assistant response after sending a question about their notes.

steps.description: Verify text "Start Chat" is not visible
Type "Using my notes, summarize the key points about my current subjects and tasks." into the message input field
Verify an assistant response element is visible

title: API key progressive disclosure: prompt appears when sending without key
description: Verifies that sending a message without an API key triggers a visible 'API Key required' modal prompt.

steps.description: Type "What do my notes say about my next deadlines?" into the message input field
Verify text "API Key required" is visible
Verify text "Add API Key" is visible

title: Add API key and resume chat to get a response
description: Verifies the user can add an API key from the required modal and then receive a chat response after saving.

steps.description: Type "Answer using only my notes: what should I study first this week?" into the message input field
Verify text "API Key required" is visible
Type "sk-test-1234567890" into the API key input field
Verify an assistant response element is visible

title: Cancel/close API key modal does not send message
description: Verifies that dismissing the API key required modal does not produce an assistant response for the attempted message.

steps.description: Type "From my notes, list my upcoming exams." into the message input field
Verify text "API Key required" is visible
Verify text "API Key required" is not visible
Verify an assistant response element is not visible

title: Empty message is not sent
description: Verifies the chat input prevents sending an empty message and no assistant response appears.

steps.description: Verify text "API Key required" is not visible
Verify an assistant response element is not visible

title: Long question can be entered and submitted
description: Verifies the chat supports a longer prompt and shows an assistant response after submission.

steps.description: Type "Using only my private notes, create a detailed study plan for the next 7 days. Include what to review each day, how to split time across subjects, and a short checklist." into the message input field
Verify an assistant response element is visible

title: Chat remains usable after adding API key (send a second message)
description: Verifies that after saving an API key and receiving one response, the user can send another question and get another response.

steps.description: Type "Use my notes: what are the main concepts I struggled with last week?" into the message input field
Verify text "API Key required" is visible
Type "sk-test-abcdefg" into the API key input field
Verify an assistant response element is visible

title: Nexus Workspace: Create a new block document and verify it persists locally
description: Verifies a user can create a new block-based document in Nexus Workspace and the content remains visible after a refresh (local persistence/CRDT save).

steps.description: Click on "New" or "Create document" in the workspace
Click into the main editor area
Type "CRDT test note: Persistence check" into the editor
Verify text "CRDT test note: Persistence check" is visible

title: Nexus Workspace: Verify content remains after page reload
description: Verifies that a previously typed block remains visible after reloading the Nexus Workspace page.

steps.description: Click into the main editor area
Type "Local persistence smoke test line" into the editor
Verify text "Local persistence smoke test line" is visible
Verify text "Local persistence smoke test line" is visible

title: Nexus Workspace: Create multiple blocks and verify ordering is preserved
description: Verifies that creating multiple blocks results in distinct visible lines in the editor in the expected order.

steps.description: Click into the main editor area

title: Nexus Workspace: Verify workspace loads without blocking errors
description: Verifies Nexus Workspace renders its main editor UI and is usable on initial load.

steps.description: Click into the main editor area
Type "Workspace load check" into the editor
Verify text "Workspace load check" is visible

title: Nexus Database: Create a new record and verify it appears in the table
description: Verifies a user can create a database record, save it, and see it listed in the table view.

steps.description: Click on "New record" or "Add" in the database view

title: Nexus Database: Required field validation prevents saving empty record
description: Verifies the database record form shows visible validation feedback when trying to save with missing required fields.

steps.description: Click on "New record" or "Add" in the database view

title: RAG response using selected sources (Notes + Database)
description: Verifies the AI response is generated and visibly references content from the user-selected sources (Notes and Database).

steps.description: Click on "Open Nexus AI" or "Open AI panel"
Verify element "AI chat panel" is visible
Click on source "Notes" to enable it
Click on source "Database" to enable it
Type "Summarize the key concepts from my notes related to this week and cross-check them with any matching entries in my database." into the prompt input
Verify element "AI response message" is visible
